apigateway.requestvalidator.CfnAbout: The `AWS::ApiGateway::RequestValidator` resource sets up basic validation rules for incoming requests to your API. For more information, see [Enable Basic Request Validation for an API in API Gateway](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/apigateway/latest/developerguide/api-gateway-method-request-validation.html) in the *API Gateway Developer Guide*.

apigateway.requestvalidator.Name.Description: The name of this request validator.

apigateway.requestvalidator.RestApiId.Description: The identifier of the targeted API entity.

apigateway.requestvalidator.ValidateRequ.Description: Indicates whether to validate the request body according to the configured schema for the targeted API and method.
Indicates whether to validate request parameters.
